name: Purple Llama Project
description: Meta's Purple Llama Project — open-source tools for evaluating and improving LLM safety and security. 'Purple' = Red (offense) + Blue (defense). Components include Llama Guard, CyberSecEval, and Code Shield.
relationToAISecurity: Direct AI-safety toolkit. Llama Guard is a content-moderation classifier; CyberSecEval is a benchmark.
